  # Copilot Instructions

  ## Source of truth

  The repository's top-level [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) is the authoritative
  source of truth for all conventions, workflows, build/test commands, and
  contribution rules in this repository.

  ## Comment formatting (required)

  When you leave any comment — in pull request reviews, on issues, or inline
  on code — you MUST begin every comment with the following line, exactly as
  written, on its own line before any other text:

  > 🤖 _This comment was generated by Copilot._ It is intended as guidance to maintainers, not required as required action for contributors.

  Rules:
  - Apply this to every comment without exception, including short or
    single-line comments.
  - The prefix goes at the very start, before summaries, suggestions, or code
    blocks.
  - Do not alter the wording, emoji, or formatting of the prefix.
  - If a comment contains multiple sections, the prefix appears once at the top.

  ## Example

  > 🤖 _This comment was generated by Copilot._ It is intended as guidance to maintainers, not required as required action for contributors.
  >
  > Consider extracting this validation into a helper so it can be reused by
  > the create and update paths.
